settings.label: Gift Sets
settings.heading:
Designed to
Be Gifted
settings.body: Beautifully packaged and ready to give. No extra effort, no extra wrapping — just a gift that feels intentional and refined from the moment it arrives.

settings.label: The Experience
settings.heading: The Art of Gifting
settings.body: Every detail matters — from the softness of the silk to the presentation of the final box. Our packaging is designed to feel refined, graceful, and ready to gift, creating a memorable unboxing experience that reflects the beauty of the brand.
settings.tagline: Refined packaging · Thoughtful details · Timeless impression.

settings.text: Ready to gift — no wrapping needed

settings.heading:
Designed in Canada,
inspired by timeless elegance.
settings.body: Each piece is carefully selected to offer a soft, refined, and thoughtful gifting experience.
